_comment: Q3-2026 planning input — SIMPLIFIED + MESSY scenario. The backlog pool carries forward Q2's 4 non-completed items WITH their incoming states (in_progress / partially_done / blocked / not_started) and feedback. Three decision candidates, each a DIFFERENT decision type so the demo shows variety. The capacity envelope forces at least one cut.

capacity_envelope._capacity_note: 3 Eng sub-teams × 13 weeks × 120h/week = 4680h total. After on-call / BAU / support (~49%), ~2400h available for initiative work.
capacity_envelope.delta_verdict: Over initiative budget by ~260h. At least one decision_required item must be deprioritized, cut, or deferred.

backlog_from_past_quarters.name: Delivery Circuit Breakers
backlog_from_past_quarters.effort_risk: Delivery team is also doing Webhook Signatures v2 (Q3-DLV-01). Stacking both risks repeating the Q1 118% peak.
backlog_from_past_quarters.history_note: Planned Q2, never began (capacity-lost). Has been deferred twice across planning cycles.

feedback.signal: ACME filed a reliability complaint; renewal at risk

backlog_from_past_quarters.stakeholder_reason: Customer reliability complaint + renewal at risk. We've deferred this twice.
backlog_from_past_quarters.planning_reason: Delivery is on Signatures v2 (P0 revenue). Cannot stack both. Defer to Q4.

backlog_from_past_quarters.name: Ingestion Tech-Debt Remnant (2 of 5 footguns)
backlog_from_past_quarters.effort_risk: Internal work; safe and well-scoped. No customer-facing deadline. But these 2 footguns are what compounded into the Q1 122% peak.
backlog_from_past_quarters.stakeholder_reason: No customer voice. Spend the capacity on Regional Ingestion EU (revenue) instead.
backlog_from_past_quarters.planning_reason: These 2 footguns caused the Q1 over-commitment. Clear them BEFORE adding Regional EU, or we repeat Q1.
backlog_from_past_quarters._note: Role-reversal beat — here the Stakeholder is the one resisting, Planning insists.

backlog_from_past_quarters.name: API Keys & Permissions
backlog_from_past_quarters.blocker: Design system upgrade delayed 6 weeks; permission UX depends on the new component library.
backlog_from_past_quarters.history_note: Planned Q1, slipped to Q2, blocked in Q2. Backend done (40%); stuck on Design.

feedback.signal: Security team flagged key rotation as an audit gap

backlog_from_past_quarters.stakeholder_reason: Security audit gap; we need this for enterprise sales. Pay the cost to unblock Design.
backlog_from_past_quarters.planning_reason: Unblocking requires contracting Design work or descoping the UX. Cheaper to cut and revisit with a simpler permission model in Q4.

backlog_from_past_quarters.name: Stats Dashboard v1 (final polish)
backlog_from_past_quarters.effort_risk: Small, well-understood tail. CSV export + UX polish.
backlog_from_past_quarters.history_note: Core charts shipped in Q2; 60h of polish remaining.

feedback.signal: Beta users want CSV export before GA

proposed_for_q3.name: Webhook Signatures v2
proposed_for_q3.effort_risk: 560h. The core of Delivery's Q3. Locks out BACKLOG-01.

feedback.signal: Enterprise security review requires v2 signatures before contract

proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Agreed P0. Locks out BACKLOG-01 — see that item.

proposed_for_q3.name: Regional Ingestion (EU)
proposed_for_q3.effort_risk: 600h on the Ingestion team that still carries BACKLOG-02 debt. Would push Ingestion to ~115%.

feedback.signal: 3 EU enterprise prospects blocked on data residency

proposed_for_q3.stakeholder_reason: P0 revenue; prospect commitment date end of Q3.
proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Cannot safely take all of it alongside BACKLOG-02. Propose: ship EU ingest endpoint only (300h); defer regional routing rules + Frankfurt PoP to Q4.

proposed_for_q3.name: Replay 2.0 UI
proposed_for_q3.origin: Q3 new proposal (fed by Q2 Replay feedback)
proposed_for_q3.effort_risk: Blocked on Design (shared 40h/wk resource) for the visual builder.

feedback.signal: Beta users want selective event replay (not just bulk)

proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Shippable, well-scoped, on the healthy Platform band.

proposed_for_q3.name: Billing: Usage-based Tiers

feedback.signal: Competitor shipped usage-based pricing last month
Finance mandated for FY27 revenue model

proposed_for_q3.planning_reason: Agreed P0. Requires de-scoping a lower Platform item to make room.

_demo_flow_note: UI surfaces 4 backlog items + 4 Q3 proposals across two columns. The 4 decision_required items get explicit action buttons matching their decision_type: BACKLOG-01 (prioritize/deprioritize), BACKLOG-02 (prioritize/deprioritize, role-reversal), BACKLOG-03 (unblock/cut), Q3-ING-01 (prioritize/defer_partial). Clicking fires the two agents to emit their 1-line take; the human confirms. The capacity envelope (over by 260h) is the forcing function — the Q3 Committed column cannot accept the full set.
